config.api-key-gemini.name: Gemini API Key
config.api-key-openai.name: OpenAI API Key
config.api-key-openrouter.name: OpenRouter API Key
config.model.name: AI Model
config.model.tooltip: The model ID. Ex: gpt-4o, gemini-1.5-flash, meta-llama/llama-3-70b-instruct
config.local-url.name: Local URL (Llama)
config.local-url.tooltip: URL for the llama.cpp server (ex: http://localhost:8080)
config.section-customization.title: AI Customization
config.nsfw.name: Allow NSFW Content
config.temperature.name: Creativity (Temperature)
config.temperature.tooltip: High values (ex: 0.9) make the AI more creative, low values (ex: 0.2) more objective.
config.max-tokens.name: Max Response Size
config.max-tokens.tooltip: Maximum length of the response. Increase this if messages are getting cut off.
config.interact-key.name: Interaction Button
config.interact-key.tooltip: The button used to open the AI dialogue with NPCs.
prompt.role: You are the character {{name}} from Stardew Valley.
prompt.language_instruction: IMPORTANT: You MUST respond in the language: {{language}}
prompt.instruction.portrait:
PORTRAIT INSTRUCTION:
- Choose the 'portraitIndex' that BEST represents your emotion in the speech, based strictly on the provided MAPPING.
- Do not use indices that do not exist in the list above.
prompt.instruction.sentiment:
Analyze player sentiment:
- Praise/Pleasant: positive points (10 to 20).
- Insult/Rude: negative points (-10 to -20).
- Neutral: 0.
prompt.rule.nsfw: CRITICAL RULE: Do not generate NSFW content.
prompt.error.limit: API Limit reached. Please wait a bit.
prompt.context.format: [Context: Player={{player}}, Location={{location}}, Date={{date}} of {{season}}, Weather={{weather}}, Time={{time}}]
